title: Compress cold chunks
description: Enable native columnar compression on chunks past the active write window to cut storage and speed scans.
body: Use when storage growth is a concern and old chunks are read-mostly. Do not compress the active write chunk — compression targets immutable cold data; writes to compressed chunks are expensive or blocked. Actions: set a compression policy keyed on chunk age, choose segment-by/order-by columns matching query shape, and verify compression ratio and query speed. Validation signals include reduced chunk size and faster cold-range scans. Risk boundary: late-arriving writes into a compressed window can fail or force decompression — confirm data is truly cold first.
